value.found_quote: Codex reads `AGENTS.md` files before doing any work. By layering global guidance with project-specific overrides, you can start each task with consistent expectations, no matter which repository you open.
value.rationale: The page describes OpenAI's Codex agent system supporting custom instructions via AGENTS.md files, which allow users to shape the agent's behavior, persona, and output style through system-level guidance. Users can define global defaults (e.g., preferred tools, working agreements, behavioral rules) and project-specific overrides that are injected into the agent's instruction chain before any work begins. This directly substantiates the claim of "Output & system-prompt customization" — the ability to shape the agent's system prompt, persona, or output style. The feature is described as generally available (active), with no mention of preview or deprecation status.
